steps.prompt: Analyze {target} in {project_dir}. Identify: complexity hotspots, dependency edges that crossed module boundaries, public API surface changes, and any anti-patterns. Output a markdown report with line references.

Perform a code review of {target} using analysis.md as context. Cover correctness, security, performance, readability, and test coverage. For each finding include: severity (critical/high/medium/low), file:line, problem, recommendation.
Convert review.md into an actionable summary. Group findings by severity, surface the top 5 must-fix items at the top, and end with a one-paragraph overall assessment. Keep it under 500 words.

checkpoint_config.message: Review summary.md (with review.md and analysis.md as backing detail). Approve to complete the run.
